title: timonius tomentosus
intro: Timonius tomentosus, also known as the hairy timonius, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, as well as having antioxidant properties. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Timonius tomentosus are made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to utilize its medicinal properties.
